message:
v0.3.3: persist recalibration_count across clean windows

Don't reset recalibration_count on clean windows. On machines with
persistently miscalibrated guards (vmi1227854), brief non-Fail
flickers between breach cycles were resetting the counter, causing
the log spam to restart every few cycles. The counter now only
resets on daemon restart.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
